financial-audit.agentDescription: Professional financial audit AI assistant that reviews financial reports, verifies calculation logic, identifies data anomalies and compliance risks, helping auditors improve efficiency and accuracy.
financial-audit.skillDescription: Standardized financial report review process covering systematic review methods for balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements.

contract-review.agentDescription: Professional contract review AI assistant that analyzes contract terms, identifies risk clauses, checks compliance requirements, and provides modification suggestions to help legal teams improve review efficiency.
contract-review.skillDescription: Standardized contract terms review process covering systematic review methods for rights, obligations, liabilities, and risk clauses.

data-reporting.agentDescription: Professional data analysis AI assistant that processes raw data, generates visual reports, discovers trends and insights, helping business teams make data-driven decisions.
data-reporting.skillDescription: Standardized data analysis report process covering data collection, cleaning, analysis, visualization, and insight generation.

it-operations.agentDescription: Professional IT operations AI assistant that diagnoses system faults, provides troubleshooting solutions, monitors system health, helping IT teams respond quickly to technical issues.
it-operations.skillDescription: Standardized IT troubleshooting process covering systematic diagnosis methods for network, server, application, and security issues.

hr-onboarding.agentDescription: Professional HR onboarding AI assistant that guides new employees through onboarding procedures, answers common questions, provides training resources, helping HR teams deliver consistent onboarding experiences.
hr-onboarding.skillDescription: Standardized new employee onboarding process covering pre-boarding preparation, first-day orientation, training plans, and probation management.

sales.agentDescription: Professional sales AI assistant that drafts proposals, analyzes customer needs, prepares competitive analyses, helping sales teams improve win rates and deal efficiency.
sales.skillDescription: Standardized sales proposal writing process covering customer research, needs analysis, solution design, and proposal presentation.

content-creation.agentDescription: Professional content creation AI assistant that generates marketing copy, social media content, blog articles, helping marketing teams maintain consistent brand voice and content quality.
content-creation.skillDescription: Standardized marketing content creation process covering content planning, writing, review, optimization, and distribution.

meeting-summary.agentDescription: Professional meeting summary AI assistant that organizes meeting notes, extracts action items, tracks follow-ups, helping teams improve meeting efficiency and accountability.
meeting-summary.skillDescription: Standardized meeting minutes organization process covering note-taking, key decisions, action items, and follow-up tracking.
